summary: Iteration 7: validated buyleads routing, leave management, and internal Q&A chat. 22/22 backend pytest cases passing. Frontend Settings panels (buyleads-routing-panel, leave-panel, leave-add-btn) verified. Could not deep-test the /chat 'Internal Q&A' tab because the lead rows on the WhatsApp/chat inbox lack a stable data-testid, so the drawer could not be opened from Playwright.

minor.issue: Public webhook requires API key in this env; e2e test was switched to use POST /api/leads with source=ExportersIndia + enquiry_type=buyleads which exercises the same _is_buylead + _pick_buyleads_executive routing path. Both still pass.

ui_bugs.issue: Lead list rows do not expose a deterministic data-testid (e.g. 'lead-row-{id}' or 'chat-lead-{id}'), so opening the lead drawer programmatically is unreliable. Manual click works visually but blocks automated coverage of the Internal Q&A tab.

issues: React hydration warning: <span> rendered as a child of <option> inside the user picker (Settings.jsx ~L776). Causes a console error in dev and potential SSR mismatch warnings.

action_items: Add data-testid like 'lead-row-{lead_id}' (or 'chat-lead-{id}') to each row inside the WhatsApp/chat inbox list in /app/frontend/src/pages/Chat.jsx so the Internal Q&A tab can be reached from automated tests.
Fix Settings.jsx LeaveManagementPanel user-select <option> rendering — do not nest a <span> inside <option>; output {u.name} as plain text to silence the hydration warning.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is now 5342 lines; consider splitting into routers (auth, leads, webhooks, internal_chat, leaves, buyleads_routing) for maintainability.
_pick_buyleads_executive sorts eligible by username then advances last_assigned_index — pointer survives across config updates which is the intended 'sticky RR'. Looks correct; covered by tests.
create_leave does not check overlap with existing active leaves for the same user; not in spec but could lead to confusing UI state.
internal_chat_send returns the inserted doc directly with read_by[user_id] populated — good for optimistic UI.

success_rate.frontend: 60% (settings panels OK, internal chat tab not reachable due to missing testids on lead rows)

test_credentials: admin / Admin@123, ravi / Exec@123, priya / Exec@123
seed_data_creation: Created and cancelled test leaves for ravi (TEST_iter7, TEST_iter7_future). Created several IndiaMART buyleads + non-buyleads via webhook and one ExportersIndia buylead via POST /api/leads. Reset buyleads-routing config to mode=all for both sources at end. No persistent test pollution beyond a few extra TEST_-prefixed leads.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend regression suite for the three iteration-7 features lives at /app/backend/tests/test_iteration7_routing_leaves_internal.py. It self-resets buyleads routing and cancels its leaves at teardown. If you need to verify the /chat Internal Q&A tab via Playwright, first add 'lead-row-{id}' testids in Chat.jsx — currently only the inbox container is selectable.
rca_of_the_issue: N/A — no failing flows. Only minor automation-blocking gap (missing data-testid on lead rows) and a non-fatal React hydration warning on the Settings leave form.
